name: Crunchy Zucchini and Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Blanch the zucchini in boiling water for 1 minute; drain.
2. Melt the margarine.
3. Add onion and garlic to the melted margarine. Cook on medium heat for about 1 minute.
4. Add the zucchini to the pan and cook, covered, for 2 minutes.
5. Add the tomatoes and cook, covered, for an additional 30 seconds.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Sprinkle sesame seeds over the mixture.
8. Gently toss all ingredients together.
